```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Governor Gavin Newsom signed Assembly Bill 1386 to expedite housing services for homeless veterans.",
    "Many homeless veterans are ineligible for supportive housing services due to service-connected benefits that place them outside of eligibility criteria.",
    "Supportive housing units built specifically for homeless veterans can remain vacant for months while veterans sleep on the streets.",
    "AB 1386 aims to provide increased flexibility and an expedited process for moving homeless veterans into supportive housing.",
    "Los Angeles County is home to nearly 10% of all homeless veterans in the nation.",
    "High vacancy rates for veterans’ supportive housing units are a significant problem in Los Angeles County.",
    "Increasing flexibility for certain eligibility requirements will allow vacant beds to be matched with veterans in need of services."
  ]
}
```
